description_long: This is a fully equipped firefighter dressed in dark turnout gear with high-visibility yellow reflective stripes on the arms, legs, and torso. The figure wears a protective helmet with a wide brim and a face mask connected to a self-contained breathing apparatus (SCBA) mounted on the back. The uniform includes reinforced gloves, boots with rugged soles, and a utility belt holding various pouches and tools. The SCBA features a large air cylinder and harness system, while the chest area displays a radio and additional gear. Patches and insignia are visible on the upper sleeves, indicating fire department affiliation. The overall appearance is robust, functional, and designed for hazardous urban environments.
description: A firefighter in full turnout gear with reflective stripes, helmet, face mask, and SCBA, carrying tools and fire department insignia.
description_view_0: Front view showing the helmet, face mask, chest radio, reflective stripes, and utility belt with tools.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the SCBA tank, harness, and side profile of the helmet and gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full SCBA tank, harness system, and reflective stripes on the back and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the helmet, face mask, and additional pouches on the belt.
